title: 上海师范大学研究生学位论文规范示例（文科）格式要求抽取稿

sourceDocuments.title: 上海师范大学研究生学位论文规范示例（文科）
sourceDocuments.path: source-documents/上海师范大学研究生学位论文规范示例（文科）(2)(2).docx
sourceDocuments.notes: Attested public source DOCX committed under this public-source onboarding example.

sourceDocuments.title: OpenXML extraction evidence
sourceDocuments.notes: Summarized from word/document.xml and word/styles.xml. Raw extraction text is not committed.

requirements.title: A4 portrait page and margins
requirements.description: The source DOCX uses A4 portrait pages with fixed margins and header/footer distances.
requirements.normalizedValue: A4 portrait; top/bottom 2.54 cm; left/right 3.17 cm; header/footer 2.0 cm
requirements.notes: Requires human review against the official current SHNU rule text.

requirements.title: Front matter uses Roman page numbers
requirements.description: Front matter sections use upper Roman page numbers and restart at one.

requirements.title: Body uses decimal page numbers
requirements.description: Body sections use decimal page numbers and restart at one.

requirements.title: Body paragraph font and spacing
requirements.description: Body text uses Songti Chinese, Times New Roman Latin, 12 pt, first-line indent 2 characters, and 20 pt line spacing.

evidence.shortQuote: 宋体，小四号...首行左缩进2个汉字符。行距20磅

requirements.normalizedValue: 宋体/Times New Roman, 12 pt, first-line indent 2 chars, exact 20 pt line spacing

requirements.title: Heading hierarchy
requirements.description: Main titles use Heiti 16 pt bold centered; second-level titles use Heiti 15 pt centered; third-level titles use Heiti 14 pt left aligned.

evidence.shortQuote: 一级标题：黑体，三号，加粗居中

requirements.normalizedValue: H1 16 pt bold centered; H2 15 pt centered; H3 14 pt left
requirements.notes: Mapped to levels 1-3; heading numbering follows chapter-oriented Stage 1 numbering.

requirements.title: Centered chapter-name header
requirements.description: The source sample states that the header is Songti 10.5 pt, justified, with the chapter name centered.

evidence.shortQuote: 页眉：宋体五号...章节名称居中

requirements.normalizedValue: header centered; dynamic chapter name desired
requirements.notes: Partially mapped: current template uses deterministic centered header text; dynamic per-chapter header should be implemented through overrides or future renderer support.

requirements.title: TOC levels 1-3
requirements.description: The source DOCX contains a Word TOC field configured for heading levels 1 through 3.
requirements.normalizedValue: TOC title 目录; minLevel 1; maxLevel 3; Word field code

requirements.title: Cover fields and SHNU wordmark
requirements.description: The cover contains the SHNU wordmark, school code, student number, thesis title, degree type, college, major, research direction, author, advisor, and completion date.
requirements.normalizedValue: Cover page template with metadata and variables
requirements.notes: Academic cover is implemented. The professional-degree cover variant is recorded but not conditionally rendered in Stage 1.

requirements.title: Originality and use authorization declarations
requirements.description: The source sample includes originality and thesis-use authorization declaration pages with signature/date fields.
requirements.normalizedValue: Declaration page template with fixed declaration text and signature fields
requirements.notes: Mapped to declarationText page template block.

requirements.title: GB/T 7714 bibliography
requirements.description: The references section states that entries follow GB/T 7714-2015.
requirements.normalizedValue: Reference title 参考文献; numeric bibliography markers
requirements.notes: Citation style semantics need human review; Stage 1 renders structured bibliography entries.

requirements.title: Appendix title and numbering note
requirements.description: The appendix title follows the chapter title style; appendix item numbering uses A/B/C series in the source note.

evidence.shortQuote: 附录的序号用 A，B，C…系列

requirements.normalizedValue: Appendix heading follows H1; appendix-specific figure/table/equation numbering noted
requirements.notes: Partially mapped; appendix-specific numbering is not fully represented by current FormatSpec.

mappings.notes: Mapped to front matter section format.
Exact 20 pt line spacing is mapped to lineSpacingExactPt.
Static centered header mapped; dynamic chapter-name header remains a renderer/template limitation.
Mapped to Word TOC field levels 1-3.
Academic cover implemented; professional cover variant requires a separate template or conditional page-template support.
GB/T 7714 label recorded; semantic citation formatting requires review.
Appendix heading mapped; appendix-specific numbering remains a limitation.

unresolvedItems: Professional-degree cover variant requires a separate template or conditional page-template support.
Dynamic chapter-name headers require section-instance overrides or renderer support.
Exact 20 pt line spacing is now represented by lineSpacingExactPt.

approval.notes: Machine-assisted public-source extraction draft. Human review is required before this real-institution template is accepted.
